name: NVC International Holdings Limited
summary: NVC International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells lamps, luminaries, lighting electronic products, and related products in China and internationally. It offers interior lighting products, including strips, spotlights, downlights, track lights, panel lights, fluorescent luminaires, ceiling and wall lights, lamps, linear lights, and drivers; and exterior lighting products, such as flood lights, in-ground lights, underwater lights, bollard lights, post top lights, surface wall lights, recessed wall lights, under-canopy lights, and lighting controllers and drivers for commercial, emergency, industrial, office, residential, and traditional lightings. The company was formerly known as NVC Lighting Holding Limited and changed its name to NVC International Holdings Limited in January 2020. NVC International Holdings Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Tai Po, Hong Kong.
